case_title: TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES VS PARKER, MARY ANN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,855.44 FILED BY TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, MARY ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
